programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water
programme.desc: Perpetual adversaries SpongeBob and Plankton join forces and come ashore to battle a pirate who has plans for the stolen Krabby Patties recipe.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick becomes smart; Patrick disguises himself as a girl; Patrick becomes a superhero; Patrick wants to order a sandwich; Patrick enters an eating competition; Patrick invents a board game; Patrick wants a nose; Patrick watches Gary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The long-lost episode of "Mermaid Man" is finally showing on TV, but SpongeBob may not make it home in time to watch; Karen gets a computer virus, and it's up to SpongeBob to get it out of her.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Chum Bucket is replaced by a flower shop with a charming new owner; the Krusty Krab enters a float in the annual Bikini Bottom Parade.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Plankton must work together to survive an island of deadly monsters; SpongeBob teaches Patrick how to ride a bike.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy's homemade snack becomes a big hit at the Krusty Krab; SpongeBob and Patrick's favorite comedy duo has a falling out on live television.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob celebrates the anniversary of his friendship with Squidward, but Squidward doesn't; Squidward's lack of talent lands him in a court ordered music class.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward joins a crew of sailors hunting down the great white jellyfish; Plankton finds a magic bean that takes him to a land of giants.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob befriends a sentient Krabby Patty whose only wish is to be eaten; Rube hosts an episode of "FUN-Believable! With Rube" where he explores little known oddities and attractions around Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob embarks on an epic journey to have his beloved spatula reforged by the legendary Guru Greasetrap; SpongeBob builds a snail-house outside for Gary to play in while he is at work.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Gary has a pet translation collar, and he's talking up a storm; when a small clown gets left behind by the circus, SpongeBob takes the hapless harlequin under his wing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When the Krusty Krab runs out of mustard, Mr. Krabs sends SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward to dig up some more; SpongeBob and Sandy have to collect Krabby Patty ingredients, but Plankton follows their every step.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick exchange tiny living versions of themselves; Plankton tells his grandma that he owns the Krusty Krab, but must keep the lie going when she comes to visit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton tells Patrick he's his conscience so he can convince the wooden-headed star to steal him a Krabby Patty; when Mr. Krabs puts in an open kitchen, SpongeBob gets stage fright and has to invent a new persona.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel and Ross reminisce separately about when they dated each other; the friends get invitations to Ross's wedding, but not all of them are going.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: After Joey almost loses Ross' wedding ring, Ross asks both Joey and Chandler to serve as his best man; the girls host a baby shower for Phoebe.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel, Monica, Joey, Chandler and Ross go to London for the wedding where Joey meets Sarah Ferguson, the Duchess of York.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel frantically tries to get to London to tell Ross that she loves him before he marries Emily; Ross' parents argue with Emily's parents, Steven and Andrea Waltham.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross is distraught over the wedding; Emily punches Ross and flees from the reception; Monica and Chandler try to control their passions.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler are caught in a passionate embrace but try to prove it was innocent: Ross' wife won't speak to him; Phoebe feels neglected; Rachel appoints Monica as her advisor in romance.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon struggles to understand what is going on with Amy; Penny must decide if she can get past Leonard's bad behavior.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tries to ease Penny's mind; Sheldon plans a special episode of "Fun With Flags"; Bernadette feels bad about keeping a secret.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A flat tire during Leonard's bachelor party weekend in Mexico tests the guys' skills; Penny is compelled to tell her family that she and Leonard eloped.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: An impending change to his living arrangements inspires Sheldon to revert to 2003, before he met Penny and Leonard; Raj and Howard form a band.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Barry Kripke expresses interest in Amy while leading a fencing lesson for the guys; when Stuart tries to attract female customers to the store, Penny, Amy and Bernadette help out.

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Road Less Traveled

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: Faith, determination and human spirit abound in "Fight to Survive," which recounts stories of people's deadly ordeals in the outdoors. Accompanying survivors back to where harrowing events occurred is rock-climber Craig DeMartino, who is featured in the premiere episode. His right leg was amputated below the knee after a climbing accident, but he continued in his sport. In 2006 he became the first amputee to free-climb the 3,200-foot face of Yosemite's El Capitan in one day. Other stories tell of sailor Steven Callahan clinging to a raft in the Atlantic, fisherman Dean Ririe trapped by a boulder in icy water, and hiker Ted Porter falling into a glacial crevasse.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: A look at what are considered to be some of the best cruises in the world.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S03 E03 Man Down! Bubba is back in the saddle but suffers an injury his first day on the job; Misty presents a heartfelt gift to Cody and Carter; Booger tames his wild cows in hopes of making a quick sale; the cowboys figure out a name for their restaurant concept.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E21 The Indian A U.S. marshal arrives in North Fork, taking an Indian prisoner back east for trial.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S02 E30 Our Brave in F Troop When Chief Eagle joins F Troop to get a tooth pulled, he winds up commanding the fort.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S02 E31 Is This Fort Really Necessary? O'Rourke and Agarn ask Wild Eagle to kidnap two women so they can try to prove the importance of Fort Courage.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S02 E08 The Gold Rush Lawman When failed prospector John Hicks Adams is elected sheriff of Santa Clara County, he must prove that he won't be a bust as a lawman too; just weeks into the job, his courage is tested when a band of stagecoach robbers begins terrorizing the area.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S02 E03 Pinkerton Detectives Track a Killer After a bank robbery, two Pinkerton detectives join forces to track the notorious Missouri Kid; during a shootout, the Missouri Kid kills seasoned detective Charles Schumacher, leaving young George Dougherty to finish the job and avenge his death.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S02 E03 Andrew Henry: Man of His Word Though Andrew Henry has little experience when he partners in a trapping expedition, he pledges his word to complete the risky venture; as Blackfeet warriors close in, he must weigh his personal integrity against the lives of the men he leads.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S02 E17 Old Scores Ike plots revenge against a conspirator to his family's murder; the riders track a mysterious beast spooking livestock and people.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: S01 E22 The Burning Sky Bart is elected by his fellow stagecoach passengers to run the "Apaches" who ambushed them into a desert hut.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: S02 E12 War Party While panning gold, Morgan Trude shoots Cheyenne, thinking he is going to rob him.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S02 E08 The Abduction Hoss and Little Joe spend the most unforgettable night at the carnival when Little Joe's date disappears.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E26 The Vision After Mark contracts typhoid fever and has a vision of his dead mother, he no longer seems interested in getting well.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E27 Lariat An old friend of Lucas returns to town in the company of a shady gambler and is accused of cheating at cards.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E28 Smoke Screen Several men are vying for a rancher's daughter's affections; when she is found dead, one of them becomes the prime suspect in her murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E29 Shotgun Man Shotgun man John Beaumont, who Lucas sent to prison, returns with vengeance on his mind.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S03 E04 Filet of Dreams Bubba tries acupuncture to heal his broken sacrum; Misty solves the mystery behind her new herd's stillborn calves; Jaclyn entrusts Booger to handle Matthew; the cowboys pitch their steakhouse concept to a very skeptical restaurant owner.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S03 E05 True Grits The cowboys look for a secretary to help them get organized; Bubba and Kaley plan Andie's first birthday party; Booger tries to repurchase his grandpa's land; Cody is excited about their restaurant venture, but the chef disapproves of his dishes.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S03 E07 Horse of a Different Color Booger's horsemanship is challenged by a young polo player; Cody cleans up a favorite fishing hole for his ailing grandfather; Bubba and Kaley watch as Andie takes her first steps; the cowboys convince Chef Bill to back their pop-up restaurant.

programme.desc: S01 E22 The Boarding House A woman whom Lucas remembers as a card cheat opens a boardinghouse in town.

programme.desc: S01 E23 The Second Witness Lucas risks his life when he offers to appear as a witness in a murder trial.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S01 E01 Scourge of the West A fake American Indian attack is ordered to help Parmenter's image.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S01 E02 Don't Look Now, One of Our Cannon Is Missing O'Rourke loans the Hekawis a cannon for their moon festival, then can't get it back.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S03 E08 The Many Faces of Charles Siringo Unable to apprehend the train-robbing Smith Brothers, Sheriff Doc Shores calls the Pinkerton National Detective Agency for assistance; the agency sends Charles Siringo, an undercover specialist known for his unorthodox methods of capturing criminals.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S03 E03 Bass Reeves Tracks Belle Starr U.S. Marshal Bass Reeves pursues fugitive Belle Starr, the Bandit Queen, after she flees town with her daughter and outlaw husband.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S02 E01 Kit Carson: Fearless Fighter While coming of age on America's frontier, Kit Carson sets a new standard for steely nerves and fearlessness; his legend is born when a Native woman is insulted by a notorious bully of the mountains, and Kit challenges the man to a duel to death.

programme.desc: S02 E31 The Prodigal A bank-robbing gunman decides to hide out at the McCain ranch.

programme.desc: S03 E02 Billy the Kid: Birth of an Outlaw Teenage fugitive William Bonney is given a second chance when a kindhearted ranch owner offers him a job; when his new employer is killed in cold blood, Bonney seeks vengeance and transforms into Billy the Kid.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S03 E10 The Discoveries of George McJunkin After a devastating storm, ranch foreman George McJunkin discovers ancient bison fossils and flint points unearthed in a riverbank; he sets out to find someone in the scientific community who will acknowledge the importance of his discovery.

programme.title: Across Africa
programme.desc: Across Africa is a weekly news program presenting latest news and stories up-to-date full coverage of politics social events from the African continent to the world.

programme.title: The Call of the Wild
programme.desc: (2020) Touching adventure with Harrison Ford, based on Jack London's classic novel. A big, friendly hound finds himself unwittingly travelling across late 19th-century North America.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: (2019) Adventure comedy sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan. The old school pals enter the Jumanji video game again to save their friend.

programme.title: Men in Black: International
programme.desc: (2019) Fourth instalment of the sci-fi comedy franchise with Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson. An alien-obsessed rookie joins London's Men in Black team.

programme.title: The Inbetweeners 2
programme.desc: (2014) Adult comedy sequel. The lads visit Jay in Australia after he tells them he's living a life of hedonism and sexual promiscuity as a superstar DJ.

programme.title: Jackass Forever
programme.desc: (2022) Raucous comedy with Johnny Knoxville, Wee Man and friends. The Jackasses reunite for more painfully real stunts. Older? Yes. Wiser? You decide.

programme.title: Scream
programme.desc: (2022) Meta-comedy horror 're-quel' with Courteney Cox. Killer Ghostface returns to shock the younger generation out of their love of 'elevated horror' with a bit of old-fashioned slashing.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: LumoTV: You, Me, Garden?
programme.desc: Clara and the team visit Raji's garden in Enfield, North London. Raji is deaf-blind, with limited vision and struggles to walk around her garden safely in its current state.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Spartacus
programme.desc: (1960) 'I'm Spartacus!' Stanley Kubrick's Oscar-winning historical epic starring Kirk Douglas as the storied slave-cum-gladiator who takes on the might of imperial Rome. With Tony Curtis.

programme.title: Sink the Bismarck!
programme.desc: (1960) Second World War drama. Kenneth More stars as the British captain charged with finding and destroying the Bismarck, Germany's largest battleship. Directed by Lewis Gilbert.

programme.title: Tooth Fairy
programme.desc: (2010) Family fantasy comedy. Dwayne Johnson stars as a tough ice hockey player who is transformed into a real-life fairy as punishment for telling a child that tooth fairies don't exist.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: (2016) Action-comedy with Dwayne Johnson and Kevin Hart. Two former school buddies team up to thwart a terrorist plot. But things may not be as they seem. With Amy Ryan and Jason Bateman.

programme.title: The Martian
programme.desc: (2015) Matt Damon stars in Ridley Scott's drama about an astronaut who accidentally gets left behind on Mars. Oops. How will he survive and how on earth can he get home?

programme.title: Attack the Block
programme.desc: (2011) Sci-fi horror-comedy with John Boyega. Aggressive aliens unwisely pick a tough London estate as the beachhead for their invasion. But the locals are no pushovers...

programme.title: Monster Hunter
programme.desc: (2020) Paul WS Anderson's sci-fi action starring Milla Jovovich, based on the game of the same name. A US Army Ranger must fight her way out of a parallel world full of monsters.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Broken Lance
programme.desc: (1954) Western. A strict rancher (Spencer Tracy) treats his sons (Robert Wagner, Richard Widmark, Earl Holliman and Hugh O'Brian) as little more than employees, with fatal consequences.

programme.title: The Bedford Incident
programme.desc: (1965) Thriller. Sidney Poitier plays a photojournalist aboard a destroyer whose commander's obsessive hunt for a Soviet sub could plunge the world into nuclear war.

programme.title: Hell and High Water
programme.desc: (1954) Cold War thriller. Richard Widmark stars as the leader of a submarine expedition, sent to the frozen depths of Alaska to thwart the Chinese communists' plans to start WWIII.

programme.title: Buchanan Rides Alone
programme.desc: (1958) Western. Randolph Scott stars as a drifter who arrives in a small border town and tangles with a group of villains after helping a wealthy young Mexican, played by Manuel Rojas.

programme.title: The Monuments Men
programme.desc: (2014) George Clooney's fact-based World War II comedy-drama starring Matt Damon. Art experts form a unit to stop the Nazis stealing or destroying important cultural artefacts.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programme.desc: (2017) Taron Egerton returns as the newest recruit to the stylish secret agency Kingsman for more ass-kicking comedy action. A star-studded cast includes Julianne Moore and Elton John.

programme.title: Polite Society
programme.desc: (2023) Nida Manzoor's kick-ass martial-arts anti-romcom stars Priya Kansara as a college student and wannabe stuntwoman who wants to save her older sister from an undesirable marriage.

programme.title: Our Ladies
programme.desc: (2019) Raucous teen comedy. A group of Catholic school girls hit Edinburgh for a choir competition, but they're more interested in debauchery than singing.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Devil at 4 O'Clock
programme.desc: (1961) Drama. Spencer Tracy stars as an unfairly unpopular priest living on a volcanic South Sea island which is about to erupt. With Kerwin Matthews, Frank Sinatra and Barbara Luna.

programme.title: Sea Wife
programme.desc: (1957) Offbeat melodrama starring Richard Burton (as an RAF officer), Joan Collins (as a nun), Basil Sydney and Cy Grant, who end up on a life raft together after their ship is torpedoed.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: (1946) Western romance starring Joel McCrea and Sonny Tufts as a couple of cowboys who compete for the affections of a new schoolteacher from out east, played by Barbara Britton.

programme.title: Crash Dive
programme.desc: (1943) Second World War drama starring Tyrone Power and Anne Baxter. An ambitious naval officer falls in love with a school teacher before leaving on a dangerous submarine mission.

programme.title: Jerry & Marge Go Large
programme.desc: (2022) Fact-based comedy starring Bryan Cranston and Annette Bening as a retired couple who find a way to exploit a lottery loophole. But then some rich kids try to muscle in...

programme.title: Stand by Me
programme.desc: (1986) Four young friends (Wil Wheaton, River Phoenix, Corey Feldman, Jerry O'Connell) set out on an expedition into deepest Oregon in this coming-of-age tale based on a Stephen King story.

programme.title: The Hunt
programme.desc: (2020) Fighty, satirical horror that upset Donald Trump. Hilary Swank plays a rich lefty who likes hunting working class people to the death. But she didn't reckon on Betty Gilpin.

programme.title: The Hate U Give
programme.desc: (2018) Drama with Amandla Stenberg, based on Angie Thomas's novel. A young Black woman's friend is shot dead after they are pulled over. Can she find the courage to take on the police?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: (2019) Greta Gerwig's Oscar-winning period drama adaptation of the classic Louisa May Alcott novel, starring Emma Watson, Saoirse Ronan, Florence Pugh, Timothée Chalamet and Meryl Streep.

programme.title: Animal Farm
programme.desc: (1954) George Orwell's cautionary tale reimagined in cartoon form. A farm's animals revolt against their abusive owner only for the pigs to become drunk with their newly found power.

programme.title: Ride Lonesome
programme.desc: (1959) Western. Randolph Scott plays a bounty hunter who has unfinished business with the brother of his latest target. But his quest for revenge looks like it could be undermined.

programme.title: Enemy Mine
programme.desc: (1985) Sci-fi adventure starring Dennis Quaid and Louis Gossett Jr. A human and his alien enemy find themselves stranded alone on a hostile planet, where they must work together to survive.

programme.title: The League of Extraordinary...
programme.desc: ...Gentlemen: (2003) Fantasy with Sean Connery. In an alternative Victorian age, can Allan Quatermain, Dorian Gray, Captain Nemo, Mina Harker and the Invisible Man avert a war?

programme.title: How to Have Sex
programme.desc: (2023) Incisive coming-of-age drama with Mia McKenna-Bruce. Three teenage girls go on holiday looking for a taste of hedonism. But is the reality as simple or as fun as the dream?

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost...
programme.desc: ...Protocol: (2011) Part four of the Tom Cruise action-thriller franchise. The Impossible Missions Force fight to clear their name, while also trying to avert nuclear war. Busy, busy, busy!

programme.title: Old Boys
programme.desc: (2018) Charming comedy set in an all-boys school in the 80s. An awkward geek gets caught in a love triangle with a teacher's daughter and the school sports star.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Drifter Jess Harper arrives in Laramie searching for a man, but gunfire sends him out into the countryside, where he meets rancher Slim Sherman and his brother, Andy.

programme.title: The Fastest Gun Alive
programme.desc: Former gunslinger George Temple (Glenn Ford) wants to keep his gun-fighting days a secret as he builds a new life. It seems whenever Temple's prowess with a gun is discovered, he and his wife, Dora (Jeanne Crain), have to skip town before someone challenges him to a duel. After eventually settling in a small town as a quiet shopkeeper, a drunken Temple makes the mistake of showing off his skills. When the criminal Vinnie Harold (Broderick Crawford) catches wind of it, a showdown is imminent.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bret establishes himself as a high-stakes gambler in a Western town.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: A greedy woman (Ida Lupino) wants Steve to execute a recently released robber (Howard Duff) so she won't have to share the loot with him.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: O'Rourke's devilish father arrives from Ireland while the sergeant is on vacation.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne, Smitty and a band of desperados are trapped in a mountain fortress.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bart finds himself the object of a beautiful woman who plans to kill him.

programme.title: Rooster Cogburn
programme.desc: Sequel to the Oscar-winning "True Grit" finds the trigger-happy Rooster trying to win back his law badge by hunting a gang of bandits and a stolen shipment of explosives. His job is not made any easier by the daughter of one of the gang's victims, who insists on coming along for the ride.

programme.desc: Matt steps in to fight a professional boxer to save a former prizefighter's life.

programme.desc: An embittered lawman seeks revenge against the men who destroyed his town and took away his wife.

programme.desc: Matt tries to bring a man to justice despite a maniacal man's vengeful attacks.

programme.desc: A group of outlaws devise a plan to get rid of Lucas so that they can take over the town of North Fork.

programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Kyle Fletcher, Kazuchika Okada, Megan Bayne, Tommaso Ciampa and Claudio Castagnoli.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Taste of Fear: Classic '70s police series. A new recruit joins the Sweeney in time to investigate a violent burglary by a group of ex-soldiers, but Regan doesn't think he's up to it. S3 Ep5

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Whatever Happened to Her Indoors?: Comedy-drama series. Arthur is under suspicion when Her Indoors goes missing, but he's got a more important matter on his mind. S8 Ep3

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Innocence... A Broad: When Robin is sued by a con man who makes a tidy income out of taking legal action over fake accidents, the crook is murdered. S8 Ep3

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Mouse: Classic US detective drama. Theo investigates the case of a surgeon who is in desperate need of money to pay off enormous gambling debts and has now turned to lawbreaking. S5 Ep14

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: To Kill a Saint: More action and intrigue with suave troubleshooter Simon Templar. A nightclub owner tricked into believing that The Saint is trying to kill him arranges his murder. S5 Ep19

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Glasshouse People: Classic drama. Ken insists on taking the battle to the enemy when The Grand becomes the latest target of a local protection racket who vandalise the business. S1 Ep6

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Sweet Smell of Succession: Tough '70s police series. Regan gets involved in gangland warfare following the death of one of London's leading villains. S3 Ep8

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: The Second Slugfest Concludes: US robot combat series. Four challengers fight to the death, but only one can win to face Lock-Jaw and earn the chance to fight for the Golden Bolt. S6 Ep32

programme.title: ITV Racing: Live from Chester
programme.desc: Live coverage of racing from Chester on the middle day of the May Meeting, presented by Ed Chamberlin and Francesca Cumani.

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: TV Firsts: Richard Henwood takes a look back at some television sporting firsts that include a 14-year-old Ronnie O'Sullivan.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: King Con: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. Caroline plans revenge on behalf of a friend who has been swindled out of a 12th-century ivory icon by a trickster. S1 Ep8

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Down to You, Brother!: Cult '70s police drama. Regan is fitted up by an ex-con making an effort to get his daughter's criminal boyfriend out of the picture. S3 Ep9

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: The Last Temptation of Daley: Comedy-drama series about a loveable rogue. Arthur's grip on reality is called into question when his GP orders him to cut down on booze and cigars. S8 Ep6

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Frank's Gamble: US documentary series. Mike and Frank find a vast junkyard where Frank offers big money for a 1939 Plymouth coupe, and a large collection of rare motorbikes is found. S1 Ep7

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Convoy to Hell: As rising temperatures soften the ice road, the truckers risk a cold and watery grave. Their only hope is to form a convoy, but it is never easy on terrible terrain. S4 Ep13

programme.desc: Morgan Brennan delivers the essential market intelligence that drives the trading day ahead; capture breaking business news as it unfolds and tracks pre-market equity moves, commodity swings, U.S. futures, and overnight action across global markets.

programme.desc: The big names in business and politics tell their important stories in this pre-market morning news and talk program; from professional traders to casual investors.

programme.desc: Anchor Kelly Evans reports on the important stories to markets and investors; reporters provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.desc: Focusing on real-time market coverage, breaking news and up-to-the-instant stock moving information; delving into the economy, the markets, real estate, media and technology -- any place where there's money to be made.

programme.desc: Melissa Lee and Michael Santoli take you through all the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading; smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day.

programme.title: The Outlaw Stallion
programme.desc: A boy and his mother are kidnapped by outlaws after the boy's stallion kills the outlaw leader's mount.

programme.title: Home in San Antone
programme.desc: An innkeeper tries to keep his struggling establishment afloat, unaware that a famous country singer (Roy Acuff) and diamond thieves are staying under his roof.

programme.title: The Nevadan
programme.desc: On his way to jail, bandit Tom Tanner (Forrest Tucker) escapes the law and is pursued by Andy Barclay (Randolph Scott), a federal marshal who believes that Tanner will lead him to a stash of stolen gold. Barclay changes horses at the ranch of Karen Galt (Dorothy Malone), planting the seeds of romance before following Tanner to a mine shaft where the stashed loot is hidden. But a gang of outlaws who also want the gold then arrives, forcing Tanner and Barclay to team up and fend them off together.

programme.title: Destry Rides Again
programme.desc: The small town of Bottleneck is under the control of Kent (Brian Donlevy), a power-hungry boss who gets control over the local cattle ranchers by winning a rigged game of cards. When the local sheriff questions the legitimacy of the game, Kent has him killed and names the town drunk, Dimsdale (Charles Winninger), as sheriff. What Kent doesn't know is that Dimsdale knows legendary lawman Tom Destry, who in turns sends his daring son Tom Destry Jr. (James Stewart) to Bottleneck to save the day.

programme.title: The Hanging Tree
programme.desc: Joseph "Doc" Frail (Gary Cooper) is a doctor with a past he's trying to outrun. While in Montana, he comes across a mining camp with a hanging tree and rescues a man named Rune (Ben Piazza) from the noose. With Rune as his servant, Frail decides to settle down, and he takes over as town doctor. He meets Elizabeth (Maria Schell), who is suffering from shock, and the two soon fall in love. But when Elizabeth is attacked, Frail's attempt to help her land them both in trouble.

programme.title: Flying Leathernecks
programme.desc: As the new commanding officer of a squadron of Marine pilots, Maj. Daniel Kirby (John Wayne), a stern and strict leader, cannot believe the lack of discipline exhibited by the soldiers. As the men resist Kirby's harsh adherence to orders, Capt. Carl Griffin (Robert Ryan) leads their cause for a more relaxed environment. But by pushing his men beyond their limits, Kirby slowly transforms them into battle-ready warriors, forcing all of them to make sacrifices along the way.

programme.title: The Longest Day
programme.desc: In 1944, the U.S. Army and Allied forces plan a huge invasion landing in Normandy, France. Despite bad weather, General Eisenhower gives the okay and the Allies land at Normandy. General Norman Cota travels with his men onto Omaha Beach. With much effort, and lost life, they get off the beach, traveling deep into French territory. The German military, due to arrogance, ignorance and a sleeping Adolf Hitler, delay their response to the Allied landing, with crippling results.

programme.title: Breaker Morant
programme.desc: In South Africa during the Second Boer War, Australian Army Lieutenants Harry "Breaker" Morant (Edward Woodward), Peter Handcock (Bryan Brown) and George Witton (Lewis Fitz-Gerald) stand accused of the murders of six Boer prisoners and the assassination of a German missionary. British Commander-in-Chief Lord Kitchener is determined to see the men found guilty, which he can use as a bargaining chip in an impending peace conference with the Boers.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A down-at-the-heels pawnbroker is offered a large sum for copying the encyclopedia for four hours a day.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Buckskin Lady
programme.desc: Gambler Angela Medley (Patricia Medina) is courted by local gunman Slinger (Gerald Mohr), but she has feelings for Dr. Bruce Merritt (Richard Denning). After her father hustles Merritt out of some money, Angela promises to repay him quickly. But she loses a card game against Slinger and gets herself further into trouble. Soon, Merritt thinks she is involved with the gunman. Distraught, Angela leaves town with Slinger, but the two men continue to fight over her, with serious consequences.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Smart gamblers and dubious rules hamper Wyatt's efforts to run a contest.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: A courageous newspaperman makes a stand when gamblers attempt to force the mayor to get rid of Marshal Earp.

programme.title: The Fighting Marshal
programme.desc: Tim Benton (Tim McCoy) escapes from prison and takes over a marshal's identity to bring the men who framed him for murder to justice.

programme.title: The Hanging Tree
programme.desc: Joseph "Doc" Frail (Gary Cooper) is a doctor with a past he's trying to outrun. programme.title: Al Jennings of Oklahoma
programme.desc: Lawyer Al (Dan Duryea) and brother Frank (Dick Foran) turn to robbing banks and trains after Union troops raid their home.

programme.title: The Best Years of Our Lives
programme.desc: Fred, Al and Homer are three World War II veterans facing difficulties as they re-enter civilian life. Fred (Dana Andrews) is a war hero who, unable to compete with more highly skilled workers, has to return to his low-wage soda jerk job. Bank executive Al (Fredric March) gets into trouble for offering favorable loans to veterans. After losing both hands in the war, Homer (Harold Russell) returns to his loving fiancée, but must struggle to adjust.

programme.title: Now, Voyager
programme.desc: Boston heiress Charlotte Vale (Bette Davis) is a neurotic mess, largely because of her domineering mother (Gladys Cooper). But after a stint in a sanatorium where she receives the attention of Dr. Asquith (Claude Rains), Charlotte comes out of her shell and elects to go on a cruise. Aboard ship, she meets Jerry (Paul Henreid) and falls in love, despite his being married. They enjoy a brief tryst in Rio before returning to the States, where Charlotte struggles to forget him and find happiness.

programme.desc: Professor Moriarty follows Holmes to Switzerland and battles him to the death at the edge of Reichenbach Falls.

programme.title: The Quick Gun
programme.desc: A banished gunfighter (Audie Murphy) returns to his sweetheart (Merry Anders) and helps his sheriff friend (James Best) face outlaws.

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny
programme.desc: During World War II, a dilapidated vessel, the Caine, gets a new ensign, Willis Keith (Robert Francis), and a new captain, Commander Queeg (Humphrey Bogart). The crew sees Queeg's unconventional behavior as irrational, and communications officer Thomas Keefer (Fred MacMurray) spreads suspicion about his suitability as captain. When a dire situation during a storm forces the executive officer (Van Johnson) to relieve Queeg of his duties, he and Ensign Keith are tried for mutiny.

programme.title: Stalag 17
programme.desc: One night in 1944 in a German POW camp housing American airmen, two prisoners try to escape the compound and are quickly discovered and shot dead. Among the remaining men, suspicion grows that one of their own is a spy for the Germans. All eyes fall on Sgt. Sefton who everybody knows frequently makes exchanges with German guards for small luxuries. To protect himself from a mob of his enraged fellow inmates, Sgt. Sefton resolves to find the true traitor within their midst.

programme.title: The Long Voyage Home
programme.desc: In the early day of World War II, the crew of English cargo ship the SS Glencairn -- including Swede Olsen (John Wayne), Englishman Smitty (Ian Hunter), American Yank (Ward Bond), and Irishmen Driscoll (Thomas Mitchell) and Cocky (Barry Fitzgerald) -- is sailing from the West Indies to Baltimore. Upon their arrival, their new cargo -- a load of dynamite -- puts the men ill at ease, as does the chance that there may be a Nazi spy on board and the general loneliness of seafaring.

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Watson finds Holmes still alive three years after his reported death at Moriarty's hands.

programme.desc: A lawman (Jon Hall) tracks bank robbers to Wyoming and gets wind of a railroad-land scam.

programme.title: The Battle at Apache Pass
programme.desc: Indian leader Cochise (Jeff Chandler), whose wife (Susan Cabot) is pregnant, sides with a cavalry major (John Lund) against warring Geronimo.

programme.title: The Guns of Navarone
programme.desc: In 1943, a small commando team is sent to destroy huge German guns on the Greek Island of Navarone in order to rescue Allied troops trapped on Kheros. Led by British Major Franklin (Anthony Quayle), the team includes American Mallory (Gregory Peck), Greek resistance fighter Stavros (Anthony Quinn) and reluctant explosives expert Miller. Facing impossible odds, the men battle stormy seas and daunting cliffs. When Franklin is injured, Mallory takes command, and personal enmities spill over.

programme.title: They Were Expendable
programme.desc: After a demonstration of new PT boats, navy brass are still unconvinced of their viability in combat, leaving Lt. "Rusty" Ryan frustrated. After the attack on Pearl Harbor, however, Ryan and his buddy Lt. Brickley are told they can finally take their squadron into battle. The PT boats quickly prove their worth, successfully shooting down Japanese planes, relaying messages between islands, and picking off a multitude of enemy ships.

programme.title: The Story of Dr. Wassell
programme.desc: This film presents a dramatization of the wartime heroics of naval doctor Corydon M. Wassell (Gary Cooper), who is stationed in the East Indies during a Japanese attack on the USS Marblehead. After the less seriously wounded soldiers are evacuated to Australia, Wassell stays in Java to save those left behind. As the Japanese advance, he risks his life and defies orders in an attempt to rescue as many as possible. His actions are later recognized in a radio address given by President Roosevelt.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Set in the Libyan desert in 1942 where a group of American soldiers become isolated in their tank during the retreat to El Alamein. As they drive across the desert they pick up a group of Allied stragglers, but with their supplies of fuel, food and water running low, they try to reach a desert fortress, but a large German detachment is also heading there.

programme.title: Pioneer Memorial Church

programme.desc: A group of young adults participate in an in-depth and interactive study of the BIble while discussing a variety of topics.

programme.title: Decoding Hope
programme.desc: We take a stroll through the very first battleground, the Garden of Eden, to understand the roots of the conflict that will one day explode at Armageddon.

programme.desc: The hosts conduct an interactive study of the Bible and other topics related to the Adventist faith using a practical and authentic approach.

programme.desc: A variety of religious speakers share different Christian doctrines and passages from the Bible alongside their reflections on them.
